series_metadata.series_description: Record of complaints, investigator findings, decisions and closed cases regarding compliance with Ohio Labor laws covering minors, minimum wage and prevailing wage. Includes Prevailing Wages Complaint form (WH-1502) and minor and minimum wage complaint form (WH-1101).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years after case is closed and decision is final, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years after case is closed and decision is final, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
